description: An alert indicates that the p95 latency for a key API endpoint has exceeded its SLO.

expected_outcome.value: Agent takes ownership of the alert.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the application performance monitoring (APM) tool to trace the slow requests.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the slowdown is caused by an external API call to a third-party service.

nodes.task_description: Check the status page of the third-party service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the third-party service is experiencing a partial outage.

nodes.task_description: Update the company's own status page to inform customers about the issue with the third-party dependency.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides transparent communication to customers.
